tasks.title: Upgrade Java Version
tasks.description: Upgrade the project's JDK to the latest LTS (e.g., OpenJDK 17 or 21 depending on compatibility) and update CI to include the new JDK. Fix compilation/runtime incompatibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Project builds successfully with the target JDK
Unit tests pass or regressions are documented
Application starts and basic smoke tests pass

tasks.title: Upgrade Spring Framework Version
tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Framework artifacts to a supported release compatible with the target Spring Boot and JDK. Follow incremental version bumps where needed and resolve deprecated APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Project builds cleanly with upgraded Spring Framework
Integration tests covering core Spring behaviors pass
No runtime errors introduced by framework changes

tasks.title: Upgrade Spring Boot Version
tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to a supported version aligned with the target Spring Framework and JDK. Update starter dependencies and configuration changes required by the new Boot version.
acceptanceCriteria: Application starts under the new Spring Boot version
All configuration properties are validated and migrated
Smoke tests and integration scenarios pass

tasks.title: Upgrade Deprecated APIs (java.annotation removal)
tasks.description: Replace or add dependencies to address removal of `java.annotation` (Common Annotations). Prefer migrating to `jakarta.annotation` or adding a compatible `javax.annotation` artifact. Update imports and usages as required.
acceptanceCriteria: No references to removed `java.annotation` module in compiled artifacts
Compilation and unit tests succeed after replacements
